name: retro-messenger-assistant
description: A local-first, 2000s Messenger-inspired desktop assistant for Ollama.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/model-guide.js && node --check src/renderer.js && node --check src/contact.js && node --check src/secure-store.js && node --check scripts/set-mac-icon.js && node --check scripts/harden-fuses.js && node --check scripts/pre-release-audit.js && node --check scripts/install-local-mac.js
scripts.package:mac: electron-packager . 'Retro Messenger Assistant' --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --icon='./assets/ai-messenger.icns' --app-bundle-id=com.jesadachandraprasert.ai-messenger --asar --out=dist --overwrite --prune=true --ignore='(^|/)(dist|node_modules|scripts|tmp|website|distribution|internal-release-records)(/|$)|/ai-messenger-hostinger-site\.zip$|/(README|SECURITY|DISTRIBUTION|RELEASE_CHECKLIST)\.md$' && node scripts/set-mac-icon.js && node scripts/harden-fuses.js
scripts.package:win: electron-packager . 'Retro Messenger Assistant' --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --icon='./assets/ai-messenger.ico' --executable-name=ai-messenger --asar --out=dist --overwrite --prune=true --ignore='(^|/)(dist|node_modules|scripts|tmp|website|distribution|internal-release-records)(/|$)|/ai-messenger-hostinger-site\.zip$|/(README|SECURITY|DISTRIBUTION|RELEASE_CHECKLIST)\.md$' && node scripts/harden-fuses.js 'dist/Retro Messenger Assistant-win32-x64/ai-messenger.exe' win32
scripts.package:linux: electron-packager . 'Retro Messenger Assistant' --platform=linux --arch=x64 --icon='./assets/ai-messenger-1024.png' --executable-name=ai-messenger --asar --out=dist --overwrite --prune=true --ignore='(^|/)(dist|node_modules|scripts|tmp|website|distribution|internal-release-records)(/|$)|/ai-messenger-hostinger-site\.zip$|/(README|SECURITY|DISTRIBUTION|RELEASE_CHECKLIST)\.md$' && node scripts/harden-fuses.js 'dist/Retro Messenger Assistant-linux-x64/ai-messenger' linux
scripts.package:all: npm run package:mac && npm run package:win && npm run package:linux
scripts.refresh:local: npm run check && npm run package:mac && npm run install:local
